Test Case Title: Verify hero/lead story block renders with image, headline, category tag
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Locate the hero/lead story block; 3. Verify image, headline, and category tag are all present
Expected Result: All 3 elements present, no broken image

Test Case Title: Verify secondary headline list renders minimum some articles
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Count the number of headlines in the secondary headline list

Test Case Title: Verify each headline links to a valid article page
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Click/resolve each headline in the list; 3. Verify each opens a valid article page
Expected Result: HTTP status 200, correct article template loads

Test Case Title: Verify Trending and Local news widgets populate with clickable items and Opinion section below
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Locate the Trending/Local widgets and Opinion section; 3. Verify they are populated with clickable items

Test Case Title: Verify images have alt attributes (even if content changes)
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Inspect the alt attribute of each image in the main content area

Test Case Title: Verify timestamp on articles follows valid date/time format
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Inspect the timestamp shown on article snippets
Test Data: Expected: Hindi date or relative time

Test Case Title: Verify category tag/badge shown on article snippets matches a valid known category
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Check the category tag/badge on article snippets against the known category list

Test Case Title: Verify no duplicate lead story appears twice in same block
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Collect the URLs of all lead/headline articles; 3. Check for duplicate URLs
Expected Result: Uniqueness check on lead article URLs

Test Case Title: Verify auto-refreshing sections update without full page reload
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Observe an auto-refreshing section over time; 3. Verify it updates without a full page reload
Expected Result: Network/XHR call fires, DOM updates without reload

Test Case Title: Verify horoscope (rashifal) module loads and links to all 12 zodiac entries
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Locate the horoscope (rashifal) module; 3. Verify it links to the zodiac/horoscope section
Expected Result: Horoscope module present and links valid

Test Case Title: Verify category modules load with articles below each category
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Locate the category modules from top to bottom; 3. Verify each shows articles
Expected Result: Multiple category sections render with articles

Test Case Title: Verify Read All / View All links route to correct listing page
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Click a Read All / View All / section link

Test Case Title: Verify clicking a header category opens related content listing with news articles
Preconditions: User is on the Patrika homepage
Test Steps: 1. Open the homepage; 2. Click a category in the header
Expected Result: Redirects to section/topic listing page with proper news articles
